title: FineDist Statement
parameters:
value	Positioning
		 allowance ranges from 0.001[mm] to 10[mm].
description:
FineDist Statement

FineDist Statement

See_Also Example

Specifies and displays the positioning error limits.
  The unit of the setting value is "mm".
see_also:
Robot motion commands

Accel, AccelR, AccelS, Arc, Fine Function, Go, Jump, Move, Speed, SpeedR, SpeedS, Pulse

FineDist Example

The examples below show the FineDist statement used in a program function, and used from the command window.

Function fineDisttest

  FineDist .1           'Set precision to +/- 0.1 mm

  Go P1

  Go P2

Fend

> FineDist 0.1

>

> FineDist

0.1
examples:
Function test
   Fine 5, 5, 5, 5
   FineDist 0.1
   Go P1
   Go P2
Fend

Function fineDisttest FineDist .1           'Set precision to +/- 0.1 mm Go P1 Go P2
Fend
